task_summaries.task_scope: Quantify variance ratios and count unique values of backward packet length features per class using evidence refs e9, e10, e11, e12.
Assess dependency concentration and distribution shifts of backward packet length features across network contexts using evidence refs e9, e10, e11, e12.
Investigate potential sampling or labeling biases influencing backward packet length feature distributions using evidence refs e9, e10, e11, e12.
Examine local label-topology consistency around backward packet length features using evidence refs e9, e10, e11, e12.
